generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and grandma, I've always believed in keeping our family safe. That's why I support increasing defense spending - not just for flashy new weapons, but for real protection against emerging threats. Did you know our early warning systems haven't been updated since the 90s? That's like using a flip phone in 2026! We need modern defenses to stay ahead of evolving dangers. Our allies are stepping up - shouldn't we do the same to protect our communities? #NationalSecurityMatters #ProtectOurFuture
